scope: no-training mathematical and CUDA software qualification of the remaining-count orderless autoregressive occupation law

contract.reveal_order: uniform target-independent node permutation; no CIF-row or positional embedding
contract.normalization: the joint assignment/order path is normalized locally; small-system assignment marginals are checked by subset DP and complete enumeration
contract.composition: counts are decremented exactly; no terminal repair, mask or Hungarian projection
contract.symmetry: the scorer is node-permutation equivariant and residual-stabilizer-related unresolved sites receive equal probabilities
contract.quotient: probability sums unique orbit labelings, never crystallographic-operation multiplicity

decision_rule.pass: freeze one single-seed IID oracle-composition training Gate; untouched formula/prototype-disjoint panels remain OOD stress only
decision_rule.fail: stop before assignment training and repair the probability law or equivariant scorer
decision_rule.boundary: Q0 cannot qualify assignment, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
